content.text:
Fully-automagic HTTPS with HTTP->HTTPS redirects in one line:

err := certmagic.HTTPS([]string{"http://example.com", "http://www.example.com"}, mux)
content.html:
Fully-automagic HTTPS with HTTP->HTTPS redirects in one line:

err := certmagic.HTTPS([]string{"http://example.com", "http://www.example.com"}, mux)
